data.title: check-shim-refs.sh: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unbound variable -> 8 test failures in test-check-shim-refs*
data.description:
## Incident Overview
check-shim-refs.sh line 150 uses $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT without a guard, causing 'unbound variable' error under set -u. Affects test-check-shim-refs.sh (8 failures) and test-check-shim-refs-detection.sh (3 failures) and test-smoke-test-portable.sh.
